---
name: Methodology change
about: Propose changing a dimension or rubric
title: "[methodology] "
labels: methodology
---

## What's wrong with the current rubric

Be specific. Cite the line in `DIMENSIONS.md`.

## Proposed change

New dimension? Modified rubric criterion? Removed criterion?

## Why this makes the benchmark more useful

For buyers? For builders? For the category?

## What it changes for existing scores

If accepted, which products re-score on this dimension and how?

## Compatibility

Does this conflict with the existing four-dimension framing? If yes, justify.
